creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you Kes,

Could you please:

- Add 'python' to CATEGORIES (secondary)
- Add TEST_DEPENDS and a (do-)test: target. Package uses 'nose' for its tests, and can be invoked with ${PYTHON_CMD} -m nose

[1] Notes:

v1.0 added Python 3.x support (Python 3.3 Support), but last release was 2016. The  port (patch) allows all versions to be supported (USES=python). Explicit testing of versions > 3.3 is required
